name: Smolderdash
appearances: Trigger Happy Targets the Evil Kaos
cameos: Stump Smash Crosses the Bone Dragon
description: Smolderdash is a fire spirit and one of the Core Skylanders in Skylanders: Swap Force. She is of the Fire element.
biography: Smolderdash had always wanted to be a royal defender of the Fire Temple - home of the First Flame, a sacred torch that had been ignited by the original Fire Source. Unfortunately, she had been born during an eclipse and was believed by her people to be cursed, which prevented her from such an honor. But when Kaos stole the flame and used it to light the candles on his birthday cake, it was Smolderdash who went after it. Blazing like a comet, she dashed into Kaos' Lair, repelled the troll security force with her flaming whip, and retrieved the sacred flame just before Kaos blew out the candles. Smolderdash returned home as a champion of her people and was finally granted the honor of becoming a royal defender. But she graciously declined, having set a new goal for herself - to help fight against Kaos as a member of the Skylanders.
personality: Smolderdash is as steely and determined as they come. She whips her enemies into shape, and doesn't take no for an answer.

story.content: Smolderdash dreamed of becoming a defender of the Fire Temple and a protector of the First Flame that burned within. But there was a problem - since she was born during an eclipse, her people thought she was cursed, so they wouldn't let her. That all changed when Kaos stole the First Flame to light his birthday cake candles. Heroically, Smolderdash tracked him down and gave him a proper thrashing. Realizing then that she was destined to be more than a mere Fire Temple defender, she set off to join the Skylanders.

story.story_name: Stump Smash Crosses the Bone Dragon
story.content: Smolderdash was one of the Skylanders who attempted to fight the Bone Dragon, but was turned to stone during the struggle. She was later returned to normal along with the other present Skylanders.

story.story_name: Skylanders: Trigger Happy Targets the Evil Kaos
story.content: Smolderdash, Trigger Happy and Food Fight were assigned to defeat a Water Viper that was attacking the Mabu Market. After their mission, they were called back to Eon's Citadel by Spyro to see Master Eon. The Magic segment to the Mask of Power was revealed to be hiding somewhere on Wool Mountain under the guise of a sheep, and Master Eon enlisted Smolderdash, Spyro, Trigger Happy and Food Fight to find it before Kaos does. Once they found and claimed the Segment, they returned to Eon's Citadel. Afterwards, Smolderdash aided the other Skylanders in retrieving the pieces of the Mask of Power from Kaos, but were outmatched when the evil Portal Master used the Mask of Power to steal their abilities.

content: This should shine some light on things!
This outta keep my head warm!
Fired up about this new hat!

trivia: Smolderdash is the first female Fire Skylander in the series (second being Torch).
This also makes fire the last element of the original elements to have a female character, with Smolderdash not being introduced until Swap Force.
Her name is a play on 'balderdash', a word meaning preposterous or rubbish.
Developer Nathan Wilens comments, 'From the moment I started playing Smolderdash, I fell in the love with the precision, speed, grace, beauty and fire!'
Her official catchphrase 'A Blaze of Glory!' is a play on the phrase 'a blaze of glory', which doing something in a successful and impressive manner.
'Whip it good!' in her upgrades is a reference to the 80's song Whip It by Devo.

Her voice actress, Grey DeLisle, is very well known for the voice of Vicky from The Fairly OddParents, Mandy from The Grim Adventures of Billy and Mandy, Azula and Kya from Avatar the Last Airbender, Lana, Lola and Lily Loud from The Loud House, Daphne Blake from the later Scooby-Doo series and Kitty Katswell in T.U.F.F. Puppy.

As a LightCore figure, her eyes, forehead and flaming hair light up. But within the game, any part of her that is yellow makes her glow bright yellow, although the figure actually glows red. Also, despite her LightCore artwork, she doesn't wield a flaming whip in her hand, but in the game she does.

She has an Employee 2013 Special Edition variant called 'Snowderdash' in which her fiery pedestal, eyes and the rest of the parts where they are originally orange and yellow are blue instead. Also, her jet black body is glittering silvery-white.
She resembles the Flame Guard from Adventure Time.
In Skylanders: Lost Islands, Smolderdash has a different backstory than the one on the official Skylanders website.
She is the only Skylander with an attack that is the same as her name. Although it is in two words, while her name is all one word.
Concept art shows that Smolderdash was originally named 'Eclipse'.
She, Trigger Happy, and Gusto are the only Skylanders to have the word, 'glory,' in their catchphrases.
She resembles The Statue Of Liberty in New York, both sharing torches and tiaras with arrows on their ends.

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Smolderdash (A Blaze of Glory)
Skylanders Swap Force - Smolderdash Soul Gem Preview (A Blaze of Glory)
Meet the Skylanders LightCore Smolder Dash

gameplay: Smolderdash is a precision-based Fire Skylander who uses a flame whip and solar orbs. Her signature mechanic is the Eclipse mode, which enhances her attacks and speed. She can detonate her solar orbs for area damage or hit them with her whip to split them. Her upgrades allow her to focus on enhancing her projectile suns or becoming a melee powerhouse with sun slams and a fiery aura.

basic.name: Flame Whip
basic.content: Press Attack 1 rapidly to perform whip combos.

basic.name: Solar Orb
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to shoot a fiery orb. Press Attack 2 again to detonate it.

basic_upgrades.name: Eclipse
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to become solar charged for a short time, making all attacks more powerful. Eclipse needs to recharge for a short time after it is used before it can be used again.

basic_upgrades.name: Solar Powered
basic_upgrades.content: Speed is increased. Time to blaze through the Skylands!

basic_upgrades.name: Sunrise
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge a sun attack, release to jump into the air and slam a huge sun into the ground.

basic_upgrades.name: Whip It!
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 1 to attack with more powerful whips that do increased damage. Whip it good!

soulgems.name: Smolder Dash
soulgems.content: Perform the powerful Smolder Dash when you press Attack 3 while in Eclipse mode!

abilities.name: Super Giant
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge a sun into a super giant sun, release to throw it forward which deals more damage and hits more enemies.

abilities.name: Solar Flare
abilities.content: Critical Hit is increased. Unleash the power of a solar flare!

abilities.name: Sun Splitter
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 to shoot a blazing sun at enemies. Press Attack 1 to strike the sun with a whip attack causing the sun to speed up. Super Giant suns split into three smaller suns when hit.

abilities.name: Solar Blast
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge a sun attack, release to jump into the air and slam a huge sun into the ground causing five smaller suns to shoot out towards enemies.

abilities.name: Sunny Armor
abilities.content: Armor is increased. So bright and cheery that enemies attacks don't do anything to damper the mood!

abilities.name: Sun's Core
abilities.content: Press Attack 2 to shoot a blazing sun at enemies. Press Attack 2 to strike the sun with a whip attack and gain a fiery aura that damages nearby enemies.
